title: Recipe Recommender Agent
description: CLI agent that asks about ingredients you have, searches for recipes, and suggests meals with step-by-step instructions.
descriptionZh: 命令行Agent，询问你有哪些食材，搜索食谱，并提供分步烹饪指导。

milestones.label: Set up project and take ingredient input from user
milestones.labelZh: 搭建项目并获取用户食材输入

milestones.label: Add recipe search tool via function calling
milestones.labelZh: 通过函数调用添加食谱搜索工具

milestones.label: Generate meal suggestions with step-by-step instructions
milestones.labelZh: 生成带分步指导的餐食建议

title: Daily News Briefing Agent
description: Fetches top stories from multiple sources, summarizes them, and delivers a personalized morning briefing to your terminal.
descriptionZh: 从多个来源获取头条新闻，摘要总结，并在终端中提供个性化的晨报。

milestones.label: Fetch news from 2-3 sources via web scraping or API
milestones.labelZh: 通过网页抓取或API从2-3个来源获取新闻

milestones.label: Summarize articles with Claude
milestones.labelZh: 用Claude摘要文章

milestones.label: Format and display as a terminal briefing
milestones.labelZh: 格式化并在终端中显示为简报

title: Code Review Agent
description: Reads a GitHub PR via API, analyzes the diff, and generates a structured review with suggestions.
descriptionZh: 通过GitHub API读取PR，分析代码差异，生成结构化的审查建议。

milestones.label: Fetch PR diff from GitHub API
milestones.labelZh: 从GitHub API获取PR差异

milestones.label: Analyze code changes with Claude
milestones.labelZh: 用Claude分析代码变更

milestones.label: Generate structured review (issues, suggestions, approval)
milestones.labelZh: 生成结构化审查（问题、建议、批准）

milestones.label: Post review comments back to GitHub
milestones.labelZh: 将审查评论发回GitHub

title: Meeting Notes Agent
description: Takes raw meeting transcript text, extracts action items, decisions, and follow-ups, assigns owners, and outputs structured markdown.
descriptionZh: 处理原始会议记录文本，提取行动项、决策和跟进事项，分配负责人，输出结构化的markdown。

milestones.label: Parse transcript input (text file or stdin)
milestones.labelZh: 解析记录输入（文本文件或标准输入）

milestones.label: Extract action items, decisions, and owners with Claude
milestones.labelZh: 用Claude提取行动项、决策和负责人

milestones.label: Output structured markdown with sections
milestones.labelZh: 输出带章节的结构化markdown

milestones.label: Add follow-up date tracking
milestones.labelZh: 添加跟进日期追踪

title: Personal Finance Tracker
description: RAG-powered agent that ingests your bank statements (CSV), answers questions about spending patterns, and generates monthly reports.
descriptionZh: 基于RAG的Agent，导入银行对账单（CSV），回答关于消费模式的问题，生成月度报告。

milestones.label: Parse CSV bank statements into structured data
milestones.labelZh: 将CSV银行对账单解析为结构化数据

milestones.label: Embed transactions and store in vector DB
milestones.labelZh: 嵌入交易记录并存储到向量数据库

milestones.label: Answer spending questions via RAG
milestones.labelZh: 通过RAG回答消费问题

milestones.label: Generate monthly spending report
milestones.labelZh: 生成月度消费报告

title: Documentation Q&A Bot
description: Ingest any project's docs into a vector DB, then answer questions grounded in the actual documentation (not hallucinated).
descriptionZh: 将任何项目的文档导入向量数据库，然后基于实际文档（非幻觉）回答问题。

milestones.label: Ingest markdown/PDF docs with chunking strategy
milestones.labelZh: 用分块策略导入markdown/PDF文档

milestones.label: Embed chunks and store in Chroma or pgvector
milestones.labelZh: 嵌入块并存储到Chroma或pgvector

milestones.label: Build query interface with retrieval + generation
milestones.labelZh: 构建检索+生成的查询界面

milestones.label: Add relevance scoring to evaluate answer quality
milestones.labelZh: 添加相关性评分以评估回答质量

title: Email Draft Agent
description: Multi-agent system: one agent analyzes the incoming email tone/intent, another drafts a reply matching your writing style, a third reviews for tone.
descriptionZh: 多Agent系统：一个Agent分析来信语气/意图，另一个按你的写作风格起草回复，第三个审核语气。

milestones.label: Build analyzer agent (detect tone, intent, urgency)
milestones.labelZh: 构建分析Agent（检测语气、意图、紧急程度）

milestones.label: Build drafter agent (write reply matching your style)
milestones.labelZh: 构建起草Agent（按你的风格写回复）

milestones.label: Build reviewer agent (check tone and professionalism)
milestones.labelZh: 构建审核Agent（检查语气和专业度）

milestones.label: Wire all 3 agents together with orchestration
milestones.labelZh: 用编排将3个Agent连接在一起

title: MCP Weather Server
description: Build an MCP server that exposes weather data tools (current conditions, forecast, alerts) that Claude Code can call directly.
descriptionZh: 构建一个MCP服务器，提供天气数据工具（当前天气、预报、预警），Claude Code可以直接调用。

milestones.label: Set up MCP server with Python SDK
milestones.labelZh: 用Python SDK搭建MCP服务器

milestones.label: Register get_weather tool with city parameter
milestones.labelZh: 注册带城市参数的get_weather工具

milestones.label: Register get_forecast tool with days parameter
milestones.labelZh: 注册带天数参数的get_forecast工具

milestones.label: Test with Claude Code as client
milestones.labelZh: 用Claude Code作为客户端测试

title: MCP Database Explorer
description: MCP server that connects to a SQLite/PostgreSQL database and exposes tools for querying, describing tables, and visualizing results.
descriptionZh: MCP服务器，连接SQLite/PostgreSQL数据库，提供查询、描述表和可视化结果的工具。

milestones.label: Set up MCP server with database connection
milestones.labelZh: 搭建带数据库连接的MCP服务器

milestones.label: Register list_tables and describe_table tools
milestones.labelZh: 注册list_tables和describe_table工具

milestones.label: Register safe query_database tool (read-only)
milestones.labelZh: 注册安全的query_database工具（只读）

milestones.label: Add result formatting (table output, row counts)
milestones.labelZh: 添加结果格式化（表格输出、行数统计）

milestones.label: Test with Claude Code querying a sample database
milestones.labelZh: 用Claude Code查询示例数据库进行测试

title: Research Team Agent
description: 3 specialized agents (searcher, analyst, writer) collaborate to research a topic and produce a structured report with citations.
descriptionZh: 3个专业Agent（搜索者、分析师、撰写者）协作研究一个主题，生成带引用的结构化报告。

milestones.label: Build searcher agent (web search, URL reading)
milestones.labelZh: 构建搜索Agent（网页搜索、URL读取）

milestones.label: Build analyst agent (extract key findings, identify themes)
milestones.labelZh: 构建分析Agent（提取关键发现、识别主题）

milestones.label: Build writer agent (produce structured report)
milestones.labelZh: 构建撰写Agent（生成结构化报告）

milestones.label: Wire together with LangGraph or CrewAI orchestration
milestones.labelZh: 用LangGraph或CrewAI编排连接在一起

milestones.label: Add citation tracking across all agents
milestones.labelZh: 在所有Agent之间添加引用追踪

title: AI Tutor Agent
description: Adaptive learning agent that quizzes you on a topic, tracks what you get wrong, adjusts difficulty, and uses spaced repetition to optimize review.
descriptionZh: 自适应学习Agent，就某个主题测验你，追踪你的错误，调整难度，使用间隔重复优化复习。

milestones.label: Build question generator that creates topic-specific questions
milestones.labelZh: 构建为特定主题生成问题的问题生成器

milestones.label: Track correct/incorrect answers with spaced repetition scheduling
milestones.labelZh: 用间隔重复调度追踪正确/错误答案

milestones.label: Adjust difficulty based on performance
milestones.labelZh: 根据表现调整难度

milestones.label: Generate review sessions for weak areas
milestones.labelZh: 为薄弱领域生成复习会话

milestones.label: Add progress report with mastery scores
milestones.labelZh: 添加带掌握度分数的进度报告

title: Full-Stack Agent Dashboard
description: Web dashboard that monitors your deployed agents: uptime, cost per query, error rates, response quality scores. Includes alerts.
descriptionZh: 监控已部署Agent的Web仪表盘：运行时间、每次查询成本、错误率、响应质量评分。包含告警。

milestones.label: Build agent logging system (structured JSON logs)
milestones.labelZh: 构建Agent日志系统（结构化JSON日志）

milestones.label: Create web dashboard with cost and latency charts
milestones.labelZh: 创建带成本和延迟图表的Web仪表盘

milestones.label: Add error rate tracking and alerting
milestones.labelZh: 添加错误率追踪和告警

milestones.label: Add response quality scoring (automated eval)
milestones.labelZh: 添加响应质量评分（自动评估）

milestones.label: Display agent fleet overview with health status
milestones.labelZh: 显示带健康状态的Agent舰队概览
